articles.title: Chandimal hits fifty with SL still harbouring hopes of unlikely win
articles.description: The visitors scored at 5.79 an over on the fifth morning and lead West Indies by 281 runs at lunch

articles.title: England players overlooked as Women's Hundred captains are named
articles.description: Only three English players - Dean, Armitage and Gibson - will lead their sides in rebooted competition

articles.title: Fatima Sana to skip Sri Lanka T20Is to play in women's Hundred
articles.description: Fatima Sana became the first woman from Pakistan to be picked by a Hundred team last month when she was acquired by Birmingham Phoenix

articles.title: Shapoor Zadran dies after prolonged illness
articles.description: Fast bowler played 44 ODIs and 36 T20Is for Afghanistan; he was about to turn 39

articles.title: World Cup heroics put Mooney back on top of T20I batting table
articles.description: Brits, Sciver-Brunt, Kapp, Ecclestone, Garth among the other big movers, while Shree Charani holds on to top spot among bowlers

articles.title: Why Sanju Samson was omitted from Zimbabwe T20I squad
articles.description: Cricinfo understands the selectors did not want to carry both their senior wicketkeepers on the tour

articles.title: 'Dialling in on clear plans' the key to massive Hope-Greaves stand
articles.description: "He's shown that he's capable of scoring runs in all conditions against all bowling line-ups," Shai Hope said of Justin Greaves after the two added 242

articles.title: Shanaka's four in four balls seals low-scoring tussle for Seattle Orcas
articles.description: Ottneil Baartman played a huge role with 3 for 9 as Orcas defended a total of 121

articles.title: Sri Lanka try to make a play after Greaves 180 and Hope 112
articles.description: Sri Lanka reached 92 for 2 at stumps, extending their lead to 142 going into the final day

articles.title: Potts holds nerve to seal Derbyshire tie and dent Lancashire hopes
articles.description: Matty Hurst hits back-to-back fours with nine needed off three but is yorked by final ball

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Is Sanju Samson playing today?
articles.description: England will be looking to continue with their winning run to make sure that they go 2-0 up and find themselves in a position where they cannot lose the series.

articles.title: The Hundred 2026: Southern Brave announce Sophie Molineux & Chris Jordan as captains
articles.description: Molineux, who recently captained Australia to the 2026 Women's T20 World Cup title, was the obvious choice.

articles.title: 'Your legacy will never be defined' - Former CSK teammate Suresh Raina wishes MS Dhoni on his birthday
articles.description: Raina congratulated Dhoni on his legacy, which continues to inspire the nation despite his retirement from international cricket in 2019.

articles.title: 'They’re taking this route to ultimately select Shubman Gill' - Sadagoppan Ramesh’s stunning take amid Samson’s snub from ZIM vs IND T20Is
articles.description: Sadagoppan Ramesh believes that Sanju Samson has been left out of India's T20 squad with a hidden motive, which is to eventually bring Shubman Gill back into the side.

articles.title: 'People can do a bit of homework' - BCCI source defends Sanju Samson's omission from Zimbabwe T20Is
articles.description: The BCCI announced a 15-member squad for the Zimbabwe tour, beginning on July 23, with Punjab Kings wicketkeeper-batter Prabhsimran Singh earning a call-up in Samson's place.

articles.title: Beth Mooney returns to the top of batting rankings after Women's T20 World Cup final blitz, Shree Charani reigns bowlers rankings
articles.description: Mooney, who is the senior batter and took over as the wicketkeeper after the retirement of Alyssa Healy, scored 238 runs in seven matches, striking at 142.51.

articles.title: 'Again a shocking inclusion' - Hanuma Vihari’s huge statement on Yash Thakur's maiden India call-up ahead of Zimbabwe T20Is
articles.description: Hanuma Vihari expressed his shock upon seeing a couple of fast bowlers in India's squad for the three-match T20I series against Zimbabwe later this month.

articles.title: 3 players who deserved a comeback in India's T20I Squad
articles.description: Considering recent performances and the need for experienced campaigners in the dressing room, a few established names also had a strong case for the series against Zimbabwe.

articles.title: 'Sanju Samson is the reason Agarkar is even a selector' - Sadagoppan Ramesh’s huge claim ahead of ZIM vs IND 2026 T20Is
articles.description: "The Agarkar, who dropped Samson, is in an extension period himself. His contract was to end in June but the T20 World Cup triumph helped extend his time," Sadagoppan Ramesh said.

articles.title: Pakistan captain Fatima Sana to miss Sri Lanka T20Is after receiving NOC to play in Women's Hundred
articles.description: The all-rounder will remain available for Pakistan's three-match ODI series against Sri Lanka, which forms part of the ICC Women's Championship.
